subcodes.first_line: The Hidden One testifieth with this visible tongue that there is none other God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, Who calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المکنون بهذا اللسان المشهود انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم الذی ینادی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @presence of; reunion with God
